narrative:
Strongsville-03-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,132 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.9 percentage points.
